prompt: Create a delicate colored-pencil-style anime illustration of Frieren, shown from a high, slightly top-down viewpoint as she walks along a sunlit garden path and looks upward toward the viewer. She is a petite elf girl with very long pale silver-lavender hair in two high twin ponytails, long pointed elf ears, fair skin, and a soft shy pose. Her face is intentionally covered by a centered square censor block in a muted peach-beige color, spanning most of the upper face and nose area, while the rest of the head, ears, hair, shoulders, and outfit remain visible. She wears a light airy pale blue-gray sleeveless summer sundress with thin straps, a gathered bodice, a flared skirt, soft folds, and gentle translucent shading; one hand lightly lifts the side of the skirt. Include exactly 2 visible earrings: a small gold hoop on the left ear and a red teardrop earring on the right ear. Background: a dreamy outdoor path with warm dappled sunlight, soft tree foliage overhead, small white flowers along the edges, and pastel watercolor-like shadows. Visual style: hand-drawn Japanese anime, soft colored pencil texture, pale pastel palette, fine sketch lines, gentle bloom lighting, airy summer atmosphere, high-detail hair strands and fabric folds, no harsh outlines, no extra characters, no readable text except a small stylized artist-signature watermark in the lower-left corner reading Rindow @Rindow_Art.
